recommendations.title: Gotcha!
recommendations.overview: A student on a trip to France is tricked into smuggling secrets across the Iron Curtain by a sexy spy.

recommendations.title: Troop Beverly Hills
recommendations.overview: A Beverly Hills housewife in the middle of a divorce tries to find focus in her life by taking over her daughter's Wilderness Girls troop.

recommendations.title: Tough Guys
recommendations.overview: Harry Doyle and Archie Lang are two old-time train robbers, who held up a train in 1956 and have been incarcerated for thirty years. After serving their time, they are released from jail and have to adjust to a new life of freedom. and soon realize t

recommendations.title: Reptile
recommendations.overview: Following the brutal murder of a young real estate agent, a hardened detective attempts to uncover the truth in a case where nothing is as it seems, and by doing so dismantles the illusions in his own life.

recommendations.title: Revenge of the Nerds
recommendations.overview: At Adams College, the jocks rule the school from their house on high, the Alpha Beta fraternity. So when a group of socially-challenged misfits try to go Greek, they're instantly rejected by every house on campus. Deciding to start their own fraterni

recommendations.title: The Maltese Falcon
recommendations.overview: A private detective takes on a case that involves him with three eccentric criminals, a beautiful liar, and their quest for a priceless statuette.

recommendations.title: Stolen
recommendations.overview: A detective becomes obsessed with solving a child's 50-year-old murder, uncovering striking similarities between the case and his son's disappearance.

recommendations.title: The Kid Detective
recommendations.overview: A once-celebrated kid detective, now 31, continues to solve the same trivial mysteries between hangovers and bouts of self-pity. Until a naive client brings him his first 'adult' case, to find out who brutally murdered her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Gone Baby Gone

recommendations.title: Citizen X
